ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the building or object */,
  "zone_index" INTEGER /* Index of the zone within the building */,
  "end_use_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of end use (e.g., General, HVAC, Lighting) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the building */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the building is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the building is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the building */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Total square footage of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lighting_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lighting configuration */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building */,
  "nominal_lighting_index" REAL /* Nominal lighting index for the configuration */,
  "schedule_index" INTEGER /* Index indicating the schedule for lighting use */,
  "design_level" REAL /* Design level of the lighting configuration */,
  "lighting_type" TEXT /* Type of lighting used in the configuration */,
  "wattage" REAL /* Wattage of the lighting configuration */,
  "lumens_per_watt" REAL /* Lumens per watt of the lighting configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lighting_configs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy metric record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building associated with the metrics */,
  "fraction_return_air" REAL /* Fraction of return air in the system */,
  "fraction_radiant" REAL /* Fraction of radiant energy in the system */,
  "fraction_short_wave" REAL /* Fraction of shortwave energy in the system */,
  "fraction_replaceable" REAL /* Fraction of replaceable energy in the system */,
  "fraction_convect" REAL /* Fraction of convected energy in the system */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Source of energy (e.g., electricity, gas) */,
  "energy_unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy measurement (e.g., kWh, therms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_metrics_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy audit */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was conducted */,
  "audit_score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the building based on audit findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improving energy efficiency */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit performed (e.g., lighting, HVAC) */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_audits_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building associated with the schedule */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time for the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time for the schedule */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of schedule (e.g., lighting, HVAC) */,
  "repeat_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of schedule repetition (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., system update, energy audit) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback submitted */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating associated with the feedback (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of feedback (e.g., usability, features) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
